title: April 2025 Catch Limit Review
body: "Overview of Catch limit Changes  Under-10 meter vessels     Stock by Area March 2025 March 2025 Increase     Sole – 7e        1.25t     1.75t        The following changes are proposed for 1st April  Under-10 meter vessels     Stock by Area March 2025 April 2025     Sole – 7e        1.75t     1.0t      Cod – 7a        2t Quarterly   0.3t Monthly        Over-10 meter non-sector vessels     Stock by Area March 2025 April 2025     Cod – 7a        0.3t Quarterly   0.1t Monthly        If you have any concerns or suggested changes, please contact us using the details below:  Katie James: 07747638655  Jacob Bestwick: 07469443840  inshorequotamanager@marinemanagement.org.uk "
